headline: Multi-Family Residential Construction Preparation Checklist — and Inglewood.
articleBody:
Multi-Family Residential Construction Preparation Checklist for and Inglewood. Clients

Before your Multi-Family Residential Construction appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
